title: Vanilla Ultimate Lite
body:
# The Lite Version of A Modpack That Improves Vanilla Minecraft and Adds More Features!

![A Modpack That Improves Vanilla Minecraft and Adds More Features!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4db65825814cc60c5c6bea9404bbe2533dacb421.png)

Vanilla Ultimate is a vanilla plus modpack that adds new structures, overhauls the nether/end, improves biomes, improves gameplay, and makes the game look and feel soooo much better while still keeping a fairly vanilla-like style. This is a fork of Vanilla Ultimate that is less demanding while still having the core features of the original so that you can enjoy it even on a less powerful device! (Link To Original: [https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanillaultimate](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanillaultimate))

VanillaTweak is allowed in my pack according to their terms to my understanding (credit: [https://vanillatweaks.net/](https://vanillatweaks.net))
